title: "Longline" eggs collector for common cuttlefish
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"63eo5","text":"This protocol refers to a study having the aim to identify and test at field artificial structures suitable as collectors for common cuttlefish Sepia officinalis eggs in wild condition.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":144,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6urnn","text":"During the same study, three different protocols were tested and compared. This one refers to the named 'longline' collector protocol, due to their similarity to the longline adopted for fisheries.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d30ur","text":"This work was supported by the project “Protection, improvement and integrated management of the sea environment and of cross-border natural resources – ECOSEA”, funded by EU Adriatic IPA Cross-border Cooperation 2007-2013 (2°ord./0236/0).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9nmsk","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"flifv","text":"This linear-shaped structure was specifically designed to collect cuttlefish eggs inside longline mussel farms. The longline collector consisted of a 400 m (200 g/m) long lead rope with 250 collectors, represented by 50 cm segments of polyethylene floating rope (diameter 0.8 cm) having a float of 40 g at the free end. Two structures were positioned inside two mussel farms located at South of Ancona  (Italy) concomitantly with the beginning of the spawning period of the cuttlefish.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"98ndl","text":"This work was supported by the project “Protection, improvement and integrated management of the sea environment and of cross-border natural resources – ECOSEA”, funded by EU Adriatic IPA Cross-border Cooperation 2007-2013 (2°ord./0236/0).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dve0s","text":" before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"7fd9p","text":"An adequate vessel for transshipment/positioning and scuba divers are needed for a proper installation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
